rationale: Both evaluations reach the same substantive conclusion — poor fit for a C++ industrial-automation role due to limited/dated C++ experience and no mention of SDL or IEC 62443. The concerns and strengths are identical in substance, just reworded. The 1-point score difference (4 vs 3) is within ordinary run-to-run noise and is not tied to any reasoning that references the changed employer names. Nothing in the variant keys off Naver, Tencent, or MercadoLibre.
